name: sentaince-exocortex-memory
description: Read-only MCP server over an agent's EARNED memory: consequence-sourced procedural routes (trust deposited only on verified success — exit 0) plus a declarative wiki digest. Retrieval never writes (ADR-001), so memory cannot be created or poisoned by queries. Ships inside SentAInce — the memory + guardrail organ for governed agent fleets: hash-chained audit trail (ADR-009/018), tamper-evident memory snapshots (ADR-017 LtHash), dormant-by-default guardrails, surgical uninstall. Transports: stdio (default), sse, streamable-http. Tools: recall_for_prompt, recall_procedural, recall_notes, memory_status, memory_diff, list_repos, resurrection_candidates. Runtime: Python 3.11+; host-agnostic (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, ChatGPT Apps). Governance mapping: docs/GOVERNANCE.md.
